text: Walking into this modern, bright, and thoughtfully designed space, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The glass walls and interactive displays of 'R+D' (Responsive and Rapidly Evolving) evoke a spirit of innovation. I sense the presence of human ingenuity—how we strive to coexist and connect with intelligent machines. Surrounded by evidence of research and creativity, I feel inspired, as though I am on the threshold of understanding something significant about the relationship between humanity and technology.
